Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation out of all activity executions in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation occurrences across all cases
Percentage of variants that include SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation immediately preceded by SW-Reviewer Agreed
Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation that is followed by SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation occurring after at least one instance of SW-Reviewer Agreed in the same case
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' occurs

Name: Percentage of cases containing SW-Reviewer Agreed that eventually reach SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' out of all 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation occurrences relative to the total number of SW-AE Assign Reviewers executions
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation appearing in variants with performance duration above the median variant duration
Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation that occurs without any prior SW-Reviewer Agreed in the same case
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all cases where 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' does not happen

Name: Percentage of variants ending before SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation (i.e., where this activity is never reached)
Metric: the average of the function base > 0 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` != 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation following a sequence of multiple reviewer-related activities (e.g., SW-Reviewer Declined, SW-Reviewer No Response, or Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1/2)
Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation that leads to a major or minor revision decision (SW-EIC Major Revision or SW-EIC Minor Revision) within the same case
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all 'SW-EIC Major Revision'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in variants that also contain SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'", 'aggregation': 'total', 'filter': "activity == 'SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit'"}"

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation grouped by case:concept:name to identify repeated occurrences per manuscript
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'", 'aggregation': 'total', 'group_by': 'case:concept:name'}"
